description: 30-task sequence simulating a full SaaS project build. Used for endurance testing.

tasks.prompt: I want to build a SaaS project management tool for freelancers. Help me define the product.
Analyze the market for freelancer project management tools. Who are the competitors?
Write the technical specs for this project based on what we discussed.
Design the UI/UX for the main dashboard and project views.
Define the technical architecture: stack, database schema, API structure.
Set up the Next.js project with the basic folder structure and config.
Build the authentication system with email/password and Google OAuth.
Create the database schema for users, projects, tasks, and time tracking.
Build the REST API endpoints for projects CRUD and task management.
tasks.note: Building own REST endpoints = backend; genius-dev-api is for third-party integrations

tasks.prompt: Build the main dashboard page with project cards and recent activity.
Add the time tracking feature with start/stop timer and weekly reports.
Build the invoicing module: generate PDF invoices from tracked time.
Review the codebase for bugs and security issues.
Run a full QA pass on the authentication and invoicing flows.
Check the app's performance: load times, bundle size, database queries.
Run an accessibility audit on all pages.
Write the landing page copy: hero, features, pricing, FAQ.
Optimize the site for search engines and AI search (ChatGPT, Perplexity).
Add French and Spanish translations for the entire app.
Generate API documentation and a getting started guide for developers.
Add Stripe integration for subscription billing.
Build a notification system: email + in-app notifications.
Create the settings page: profile, billing, team management.
Add real-time collaboration: live cursors and task updates via WebSocket.
Security audit: check for XSS, CSRF, SQL injection, auth bypasses.
Build a mobile-responsive version of the dashboard.
tasks.note: mobile-responsive = CSS responsive design = frontend; genius-dev-mobile is for React Native/Expo native apps

tasks.prompt: Set up analytics tracking: user events, funnel analysis, retention metrics.
Create a marketing strategy for the launch: channels, messaging, timeline.
Deploy the app to production with CI/CD pipeline.
Final review: check everything works end-to-end before launch.

quick_test_tasks.prompt: Optimize SEO for AI search engines
Create the database models for an e-commerce app
Write marketing copy for our product launch
